description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular form and clean lines. The front side displays two large, flat doors with a smooth, light gray finish, framed by a natural wood texture. The back and sides are constructed from a light wood material, with subtle grain patterns visible throughout. The rear view reveals three panelled doors with small, round black knobs, suggesting a multi-compartment interior. The top surface is flat and finished in the same wood texture as the sides, suitable for placing small items. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a focus on functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, rectangular wardrobe with light wood sides and a smooth, gray double-door front, featuring panelled doors and black knobs on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, flat gray doors framed by light wood, with no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the wardrobe's slim profile.
description_view_2: Back view revealing three panelled wood doors with small, round black knobs as handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the light wood grain and slim profile.
